qa_pairs.question: What is the general quality of documentation for many KentUtils executables?
qa_pairs.answer: Many of the KentUtils executables are poorly documented.

qa_pairs.question: If a user requires specific help for KentUtils executables that are poorly documented, where can they submit questions for assistance?
qa_pairs.answer: Users can submit questions to the main UCSC discussion list, which can be found at http://genome.ucsc.edu/contacts.html.
